Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-29-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Full And Complete Responses To Discovery
Off Calendar Oct-19-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
William E. Jemmott, Esq., of Law Offices of Raffalow, Rhoads & Bretoi, (877) 707 7992, appearing for Defendant and moving party Jose Gutierrez Vazquez.

DEFENDANT JOSE GUTIERREZ VAZQUEZ Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Full And Complete Responses To Discovery is heard this day. There being no opposition nor an objection the Court adopts its Tentative Ruling. The unopposed Motion is GRANTED. Plaintiff to provide verified responses to Special Interrogatories, Set One; Demand for Inspection and Production of Documents, Set One; Form Interrogatories, Set One within two weeks of notice of entry of this order. Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter C. Catalanotti; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (JPT/302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-07-2016 Set For Trial On Apr-17-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
